<!-- 🇬🇧 English / 🇮🇩 Bahasa Indonesia -->

## Summary / Ringkasan

<!-- What does this PR do and why? / Apa yang dilakukan PR ini dan mengapa? -->

## Type of change / Jenis perubahan

- [ ] `feat` — new feature / fitur baru
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix / perbaikan bug
- [ ] `docs` — documentation / dokumentasi
- [ ] `chore` — tooling / hygiene
- [ ] `test` — tests only / hanya test

## Related issue / Issue terkait

<!-- e.g. Closes #123 -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `anchor test` passes locally / lulus secara lokal
- [ ] `npm run build` passes / lulus
- [ ] No secrets, keypairs, or `.env*` files committed / tidak ada secret yang ter-commit
- [ ] Docs updated if needed / dokumentasi diperbarui bila perlu
- [ ] Self-reviewed the diff / sudah review sendiri

## Screenshots / notes (optional)
